prompt_text: Best marketing automation alternatives for indie SaaS developers and small SaaS teams building user journeys teams on a budget
response:
# Best Budget-Friendly Marketing Automation for Indie SaaS

## Free & Freemium Tier Winners

### **Loops.so**
- **Best for:** Email sequences + in-app automation
- **Why:** Free tier is genuinely useful (up to 500 contacts)
- **Indie appeal:** Simple API, good for product-led growth
- **Cost:** Free → $25/mo

### **Brevo (formerly Sendinblue)**
- **Best for:** Email automation + basic workflows
- **Why:** Unlimited contacts on free tier (limited sends)
- **Indie appeal:** No credit card required, French alternative to big players
- **Cost:** Free → $20/mo

### **Mailchimp**
- **Best for:** Email + basic journeys
- **Why:** Still has a legitimate free tier despite being acquired
- **Indie appeal:** Familiar, huge community
- **Cost:** Free → $20/mo
- **⚠️ Note:** Less feature-rich than competitors for journeys

---

## Lightweight & Developer-Friendly

### **PostHog** (if you need analytics + automation)
- **Best for:** Product analytics + feature flags + event-based automations
- **Why:** Self-hostable, open-source option available
- **Indie appeal:** Great for tracking actual user behavior
- **Cost:** Free → $450/mo (but sustainable free tier)

### **Segment** (with free tier limits)
- **Best for:** Customer data platform + multi-channel automation
- **Why:** Routes data to multiple tools (email, ads, etc.)
- **Indie appeal:** Good if you're using multiple platforms
- **Cost:** Free → $120+/mo

---

## DIY / Developer-First Options

### **n8n** (self-hosted automation)
- **Best for:** Custom workflows without no-code limitations
- **Why:** Open-source, self-hostable, unlimited executions
- **Indie appeal:** Complete control, Zapier alternative
- **Cost:** Free to self-host, $50+/mo managed

### **Zapier** (if you prefer managed)
- **Best for:** Connecting tools together
- **Why:** 500+ app integrations, simple triggers
- **Indie appeal:** Quick setup, no code needed
- **Cost:** Free tier is limited → $19.99/mo

### **Make.com** (formerly Integromat)
- **Best for:** Complex multi-step workflows
- **Why:** Better free tier than Zapier (100 ops/month)
- **Indie appeal:** Visual builder, good pricing
- **Cost:** Free → $9.99/mo

---

## Purpose-Built for SaaS

### **Klaviyo** (if SMS + email important)
- **Best for:** Email + SMS automation
- **Why:** Free for up to 500 contacts
- **Indie appeal:** Strong e-commerce/SaaS templates
- **Cost:** Free → $20/mo + SMS fees

### **ActiveCampaign**
- **Best for:** Full customer journey automation
- **Why:** Affordable compared to HubSpot, good feature set
- **Indie appeal:** Good docs, reasonable pricing
- **Cost:** $9/mo starter (cheapest real automation)

### **Convertkit** (if audience/creator focused)
- **Best for:** Email + community/subscriber journeys
- **Why:** Extremely creator-friendly
- **Indie appeal:** Great for SaaS founders who build in public
- **Cost:** Free → $25/mo

---

## My Honest Recommendation by Scenario

| **Your Situation** | **Best Choice** |
|---|---|
| Just starting, 0 budget | **Brevo** (unlimited contacts free) or **Loops** (easier UX) |
| Want full journeys cheaply | **ActiveCampaign** ($9/mo) |
| Love coding/self-hosting | **n8n** (self-hosted free) |
| Building product-led SaaS | **Loops** + **PostHog** |
| Selling to small businesses | **Klaviyo** |
| No-code preference | **Make.com** or **Zapier** |
| Multiple platforms needed | **Segment** free tier |

---

## Key Things to Test First

✅ **Free tier contact limits** — Does it scale with you?
✅ **
